recommendations.title: Iceman
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Science Fiction, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An imperial guard and his three traitorous childhood friends ordered to hunt him down get accidentally buried and kept frozen in time. 400 years later, they are defrosted continuing the battle they left behind.

recommendations.title: Maximum Ride
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Six children genetically cross-bred with avian DNA, complete with wings, take flight around the country to discover their origins.

recommendations.title: Sky Sharks
recommendations.overview: A team of Arctic geologists stumble across an abandoned laboratory in which the Nazis developed an incredible and brutal secret weapon during the final months of WW2. Deep in the ice, they accidentally awake a deadly army of flying zombie sharks ridd

recommendations.title: Planet of the Apes
recommendations.overview: Astronaut Taylor crash lands on a distant planet ruled by apes who use a primitive race of humans for experimentation and sport. Soon Taylor finds himself among the hunted, his life in the hands of a benevolent chimpanzee scientist.

recommendations.title: Tremors: A Cold Day in Hell
recommendations.overview: Burt Gummer and Travis Welker find themselves in a fight for survival after investigating deadly giant worm attacks in the Canadian arctic.

recommendations.title: Leviathan
recommendations.overview: An experimental portrait of the North American commercial fishing industry through the lens of GoPro cameras placed on a fishing vessel off the coast of New England.

recommendations.title: Arctic Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their way across the ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.

recommendations.title: Alien Abduction
recommendations.overview: A vacationing family encounters an alien threat in this pulse-pounding thriller based on the real-life Brown Mountain Lights phenomenon in North Carolina.

recommendations.title: Replicas
recommendations.overview: A scientist becomes obsessed with returning his family to normalcy after a terrible accident.

recommendations.title: Thor: Ragnarok
